rationale: Gov't Code §2303.4052 governs information a nominating body must submit for enterprise project designation. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Before nominating the project or activity of a qualified business for designation as an enterprise project, the nominating body must submit to the bank:
_note: Rule text concerns enterprise project nomination procedures; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amounts. No overlap.
